validation_dimensions.description: Foata canonicalization preserves events and produces deterministic fingerprints
invariants: Event set preserved (no drops, no duplicates)

validation_dimensions.description: Delta debugging and scenario minimization produce strictly smaller traces
invariants: Minimized trace is smaller than or equal to original
Hierarchical pruning removes region subtrees first

validation_dimensions.description: Normalized traces are valid linear extensions with reduced switch cost
invariants: Every fallback tier produces valid results

validation_dimensions.description: DPOR race analysis is sound on known racing and non-racing traces
invariants: Dependent events on same resource are detected
Race report covers all racing pairs

validation_dimensions.description: Crash packs are self-contained, deterministic, and well-formed
invariants: Replay command references correct seed and config

validation_dimensions.description: Divergence reports pinpoint failures with structured context

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify Foata canonicalization preserves events and fingerprint stability
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa063 cargo test --test replay_minimization_validation_contract canonical -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify geodesic normalization correctness and switch cost reduction
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa063 cargo test --test replay_minimization_validation_contract normalization -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify DPOR race detection soundness on known traces
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa063 cargo test --test replay_minimization_validation_contract race -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify crash pack integrity and fingerprint consistency
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa063 cargo test --test replay_minimization_validation_contract crashpack -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify divergence diagnostics structure and context quality
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa063 cargo test --test replay_minimization_validation_contract divergence -- --nocapture
